# Confidential Information | WORK INSTRUCTIONS | | |-----------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------| | FETCH ROBOT RESET | | | Work Instruction No. | | | 01
WI03

Revision No.

OF | Zebra Technologies | ## 1. OVERVIEW This document outlines the procedure for resetting the F100 Robot. ### 2. CHARGING ERROR ✓ If a charging error occurs, the lightning bolt will be blinking red to reset follow the steps below. ![](_page_0_Picture_6.jpeg) - **1.** Disconnect the charging cable. - **2.** Turn off the Robot, press and hold the power button for 5 seconds. - **3.** Turn off the breaker switch. - **4.** Wait for a minute or two. - **5.** Turn the breaker switch on again. - **6.** Press the power button again. - **7.** Connect that charging cable. - **8.** If the issue persists, look in the next connector to ensure there are no foreign objects obstructing the connection. ![](_page_0_Picture_15.jpeg) **9.** Ensure that the Fetch logo is facing up. ![](_page_0_Picture_17.jpeg) *This document contains proprietary information which is the exclusive property of Zebra Technologies Corp.* ### 3. MULTI LED LIGHTS ISSUE ON FLEX SHELF ✓ If there is no charging error but the side LED lights on the Flex Shelf are blinking multiple colors at once, follow the steps listed in Section 2. ![](_page_1_Picture_2.jpeg) ![](_page_1_Picture_3.jpeg) ![](_page_1_Picture_4.jpeg) - ✓ If the reset functions did not work and you are experiencing the same issues. - **1.** Leave the unit in the charging area. - **2.** Make a note of the serial number and also make a note on the DC Fetch Battery Charging Tracker V.2. - **3.** Inform the individuals below. **Mike Alaimo** – Senior Mgr. Fetch Operations, **Shailesh Jaiswal** – Manufacturing Engineer, **Eloy Rodas** – Quality Engineer **Elba Maya** – SC Planner, and the onsite QA Team. - **4.** Await disposition from the team. - **5.** Do not put the unit away. ### 4. REFERENCES | Document # | Document Title | |------------|----------------| | | | ### 5. REVISION HISTORY The following table lists all revisions (including the original document) to this procedure, the date, and the reason for the revision.
